cause_analysis.narrative: Akshi Beauty Salon churned on 2026-04-11 after 62 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 21-day silence starting 2026-03-11. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-04-01 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: We have a surprise for you 🎀\n\nBody: Great job On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 3:24 PM Team Zoca < hello@zoca.com >…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
